role_summary: the investment banki ng analyst supports investment banking transactions including m&a,  capital raising, and advisory mandates.
responsibilities: • build financial models and valuation analyses   • prepare pitch books and transaction presentations   • support deal execution and docu mentation   • conduct industry and company research   • assist senior bankers in client engagements   • support regulatory and transaction compliance
qualifications: • ca with strong financial modeling skills   • knowledge of capital markets and deal processes   • high  attention to detail and work discipline
